signals.headline: Bitcoin and Ethereum Rally on U
signals.raw:
Bitcoin and Ethereum Rally on U.S.-Iran Peace Talks Progress | YES | MED confidence**  
Crypto markets surged with Bitcoin up 5% to ~$75K and Ethereum up 7% to ~$2.4K (two-month highs) on April 14, 2026, fueled by optimism over U.S.-Iran negotiations led by VP JD Vance to end conflict and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, mirroring traditional market risk appetite gains.[2]

signals.headline: Cavaliers take 2-0 series lead over Raptors in NBA playoffs** | YES | HIGH confidence[1]
signals.raw:
Cavaliers take 2-0 series lead over Raptors in NBA playoffs** | YES | HIGH confidence[1]

The Cleveland Cavaliers, the No. 4 East seed, defeated the No. 5 Toronto Raptors 115-105 in Game 2 on April 20, securing a 2-0 lead after winning Game 1 126-113 on April 18; no specific Cavaliers rookie is highlighted, but this early dominance shifts series win odds toward Cleveland in prediction markets[1].
